allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_SerialPort | Select-Object Name, DeviceID, Description")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_SerialPort | Select-Object Name, DeviceID, Description, PNPDeviceID")
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-WmiObject Win32_PnPEntity | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '\\''Arduino|CH340|FTDI|CH341|USB Serial|USB-SERIAL'\\'' } | Select-Object Name, DeviceID, Status')
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "pio|python|monitor" } | Select-Object Id, Name, MainWindowTitle)
PowerShell($procs = Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Modules -match "COM3" -or $_.MainWindowTitle -match "COM3" } -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $procs | Select-Object Id, Name)
